text:
Alternative Drive is the 5th character image for the Attack on Titan anime. It is the character image song of Bertholdt Hoover and Reiner Braun, and is sung by Bertholdt's voice actor, Tomohisa Hashizume. Reiner's voice actor, , only has a speaking role. It has parts of XL-TT and ətˈæk 0N tάɪtn.

The song was composed by both Kohta Yamamoto and , and arranged solely by Yamamoto.
